name: bool_identity_preserves_if_condition
description: Passing a generated Bool through the typed Bool identity must not change conditional branch selection.

name: comparison_add_preserves_lt
description: Adding the same generated offset must preserve strict less-than ordering.

name: comparison_add_preserves_lte
description: Adding the same generated offset must preserve less-or-equal ordering.

name: comparison_eq_implies_gte
description: Integer equality must imply greater-or-equal in both directions.

name: comparison_eq_implies_lte
description: Integer equality must imply less-or-equal in both directions.

name: comparison_greater_than_predecessor
description: An Int expression must be greater than itself minus one.

name: comparison_gt_implies_gte
description: Strict greater-than must imply greater-or-equal.

name: comparison_gt_implies_not_equal
description: Strict greater-than must imply integer inequality.

name: comparison_gt_is_not_lte_encoded
description: Greater-than must be the encoded negation of less-or-equal.

name: comparison_gt_transitive
description: Strict greater-than must be transitive.

name: comparison_gte_antisymmetric
description: If two values are greater-or-equal in both directions, they must be equal.

name: comparison_gte_as_gt_or_eq_encoded
description: Greater-or-equal must agree with the encoded greater-than-or-equality definition.

name: comparison_gte_self_true
description: Greater-or-equal must be true for an Int expression compared to itself.

name: comparison_gte_totality_encoded
description: For any two Int expressions, at least one greater-or-equal direction must hold.

name: comparison_gte_transitive
description: Greater-or-equal must be transitive.

name: comparison_less_than_successor
description: An Int expression must be less than itself plus one.

name: comparison_lt_implies_lte
description: Strict less-than must imply less-or-equal.

name: comparison_lt_implies_not_equal
description: Strict less-than must imply integer inequality.

name: comparison_lt_is_not_gte_encoded
description: Less-than must be the encoded negation of greater-or-equal.

name: comparison_lt_transitive
description: Strict less-than must be transitive.

name: comparison_lte_antisymmetric
description: If two values are less-or-equal in both directions, they must be equal.

name: comparison_lte_as_lt_or_eq_encoded
description: Less-or-equal must agree with the encoded less-than-or-equality definition.

name: comparison_lte_self_true
description: Less-or-equal must be true for an Int expression compared to itself.

name: comparison_lte_totality_encoded
description: For any two Int expressions, at least one less-or-equal direction must hold.

name: comparison_lte_transitive
description: Less-or-equal must be transitive.

name: comparison_negation_reverses_lt
description: Negating both operands must reverse strict less-than ordering.

name: comparison_negation_reverses_lte
description: Negating both operands must reverse less-or-equal ordering.

name: comparison_neq_self_false
description: Integer inequality of an expression against itself must be false.

name: comparison_predecessor_not_greater_than_self
description: A generated Int minus one must not be greater than the original Int.

name: comparison_sub_preserves_lte_same_rhs
description: Subtracting the same right operand must preserve less-or-equal ordering.

name: comparison_successor_not_less_than_self
description: A generated Int plus one must not be less than the original Int.

name: comparison_trichotomy_encoded
description: Exactly one of less-than, greater-than, or equality must explain a pair of Int expressions.

name: do_bool_returns_last_after_int_first
description: A do expression with an Int first expression must return the final Bool expression.

name: do_false_literal_returns_false
description: A do expression ending in literal False must return False even after evaluating an Int first expression.

name: do_first_does_not_change_comparison
description: The first expression in do must not alter the comparison returned by the final expression.

name: do_if_last_returns_branch
description: A do expression whose last expression is an if must return the selected if branch.

name: do_int_returns_last_after_bool_first
description: A do expression with a Bool first expression must return the final Int expression.

name: do_nested_mixed_returns_last_bool
description: Nested mixed-type do sequencing must return the final Bool expression.

name: do_true_literal_returns_true
description: A do expression ending in literal True must return True even after evaluating an Int first expression.

name: function_add_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-add helper must agree with the builtin addition operator.

name: function_bool_idempotent_on_comparison
description: The typed Bool identity helper must be idempotent on generated comparison results.

name: function_eq_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-eq-int? helper must agree with the builtin equality operator.

name: function_gt_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-gt? helper must agree with the builtin greater-than operator.

name: function_gte_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-gte? helper must agree with the builtin greater-or-equal operator.

name: function_int_id_preserves_addition
description: The typed Int identity helper must preserve an addition expression and its operands.

name: function_int_id_preserves_multiplication
description: The typed Int identity helper must preserve a multiplication expression and its operands.

name: function_lt_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-lt? helper must agree with the builtin less-than operator.

name: function_lte_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-lte? helper must agree with the builtin less-or-equal operator.

name: function_mul_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-mul helper must agree with the builtin multiplication operator.

name: function_sub_helper_matches_builtin
description: The typed fuzz-sub helper must agree with the builtin subtraction operator.

name: if_bool_identity_branches_roundtrip
description: Choosing between typed Bool identity branches must preserve the condition.

name: if_bool_true_false_roundtrip
description: Choosing between True and False with a Bool condition must return that condition.

name: if_branch_result_can_be_bool
description: A Bool-returning if expression must be unaffected by passing its condition through the typed Bool identity helper.

name: if_distributes_over_add_left
description: Adding a common left operand outside an if must match adding it inside each branch.

name: if_distributes_over_add_right
description: Adding a common right operand outside an if must match adding it inside each branch.

name: if_distributes_over_mul_right
description: Multiplying an if result by a common right operand must match multiplication inside both branches.

name: if_distributes_over_sub_left
description: Subtracting a common right operand from an if result must match subtraction inside both branches.

name: if_false_returns_else_int
description: An if expression with literal False must return the else branch.

name: if_nested_same_condition_else
description: A nested if in the else branch with the same condition must simplify to the outer branch choice.

name: if_nested_same_condition_then
description: A nested if in the then branch with the same condition must simplify to the outer branch choice.

name: if_order_partition_lte
description: An if over less-or-equal must select a value that remains less-or-equal to the other branch boundary.

name: if_true_returns_then_int
description: An if expression with literal True must return the then branch.

name: int_add_cancellation_left_bool
description: Left-addition cancellation must preserve the truth value of equality.

name: int_add_cancellation_right_bool
description: Right-addition cancellation must preserve the truth value of equality.

name: int_add_four_way_regrouping
description: Addition of four generated values must be stable under regrouping and re-pairing.

name: int_add_identity_left_value
description: Adding zero on the left must preserve the generated Int expression exactly.

name: int_add_identity_right_value
description: Adding zero on the right must preserve the generated Int expression exactly.

name: int_add_inverse_left_zero
description: Adding an Int to its left-side additive inverse must produce zero.

name: int_add_inverse_right_zero
description: Adding an Int to its right-side additive inverse must produce zero.

name: int_add_same_offset_preserves_equality
description: Equality after adding the same offset to both operands must match equality before the offset.

name: int_add_sub_commuted_difference
description: Adding a difference must be stable when the outer addition is commuted.

name: int_add_sub_roundtrip_left_nested
description: Adding two values and subtracting one of them inside a larger expression must round-trip the other.

name: int_add_sub_roundtrip_right_nested
description: Nested addition followed by subtracting the preserved prefix must recover the final addend.

name: int_add_three_way_permutation
description: Addition of three generated values must be invariant under a nontrivial permutation.

name: int_double_negation
description: Negating an Int twice through subtraction from zero must recover the original.

name: int_mul_add_one_expansion
description: Multiplying by one plus a value must expand to the original value plus the product.

name: int_mul_annihilates_difference_self
description: Multiplying by a self-difference must produce zero.

name: int_mul_associative
description: Multiplication grouping must not affect generated Int results.

name: int_mul_by_three_expands_to_adds
description: Multiplication by three must agree with three repeated additions.

name: int_mul_by_two_equals_add_self
description: Multiplication by two must agree with adding a generated expression to itself.

name: int_mul_distributes_left_over_sub
description: A left-side factor must distribute over subtraction.

name: int_mul_distributes_right_over_add
description: A right-side factor must distribute over addition.

name: int_mul_distributes_right_over_sub
description: A right-side factor must distribute over subtraction.

name: int_mul_double_negative
description: Multiplying two negated operands must recover the positive product.

name: int_mul_factor_common_left
description: Common left factors in a sum of products must factor back out.

name: int_mul_factor_common_right
description: Common right factors in a sum of products must factor back out.

name: int_mul_four_way_regrouping
description: Multiplication of four generated values must be stable under regrouping.

name: int_mul_identity_left_value
description: Multiplying by one on the left must preserve the generated Int expression exactly.

name: int_mul_identity_right_value
description: Multiplying by one on the right must preserve the generated Int expression exactly.

name: int_mul_negative_left_equals_negative_right
description: Negating either multiplicand must produce the same negated product.

name: int_mul_negative_one_left
description: Multiplication by negative one on the left must match subtraction from zero.

name: int_mul_negative_one_right
description: Multiplication by negative one on the right must match subtraction from zero.

name: int_mul_sub_one_expansion
description: Multiplying by one less than a value must expand to the product minus the original value.

name: int_mul_subtract_self_zero
description: Subtracting identical generated products must produce zero.

name: int_mul_three_way_permutation
description: Multiplication of three generated values must be invariant under a nontrivial permutation.

name: int_mul_zero_left_value
description: Multiplying by zero on the left must produce zero.

name: int_mul_zero_right_value
description: Multiplying by zero on the right must produce zero.

name: int_negation_distributes_over_add
description: Negation must distribute over addition for generated Int expressions.

name: int_negation_reverses_subtraction
description: Negating a subtraction must reverse the operands.

name: int_sub_add_sub_pairing
description: A pair of subtractions added together must match subtracting the paired right operands from the paired left operands.

name: int_sub_as_add_negative
description: Subtraction must agree with adding the negated right operand.

name: int_sub_cancellation_left_equality
description: Subtracting two values from the same left operand must preserve equality of the right operands.

name: int_sub_cancellation_right_equality
description: Subtracting the same right operand from two values must preserve equality of the left operands.

name: int_sub_from_sum_reassociates
description: Subtracting from a sum must be equivalent to subtracting from one addend before adding.

name: int_sub_left_add_self_negative_rhs
description: Subtracting a value plus an offset from the value must leave the negated offset.

name: int_sub_negative_is_addition
description: Subtracting a negated generated Int must agree with addition.

name: int_sub_same_offset_preserves_difference
description: Adding the same offset to both sides of a subtraction must preserve the difference.

name: int_sub_self_after_add_zero
description: A generated expression minus itself after the same addition must still cancel to zero.

name: int_sub_sum_right_associates
description: Subtracting a sum on the right must match repeated subtraction.

name: int_sub_swapped_sum_negates_difference
description: The difference of swapped operands must equal the negated original difference.

name: int_sub_zero_left_negates_twice
description: The zero-left subtraction form must match explicit negative-one multiplication.

name: int_sub_zero_right_value
description: Subtracting zero on the right must preserve the generated Int expression.

name: int_zero_sub_as_negation
description: Subtracting an Int from zero must agree with multiplication by negative one.

name: max_absorbs_min_right
description: Max of a value and the min of that value with another must recover the value.

name: max_associative
description: The typed max helper must be associative.

name: max_bounded_by_left_and_right
description: The max helper result must be above both operands.

name: max_matches_if_definition
description: The typed max helper must match its direct conditional definition.

name: max_min_middle_right_absorption
description: Min of max(a,b) and b must recover b.

name: max_monotone_left_lte
description: Max must be monotone in its left operand under less-or-equal.

name: max_monotone_right_lte
description: Max must be monotone in its right operand under less-or-equal.

name: max_not_strictly_above_self
description: The max of an Int with itself must not be strictly above that Int.

name: max_of_predecessor_is_original
description: The max of an Int and its predecessor must be the original Int.

name: max_respects_gte_left
description: If the left value is greater-or-equal, max must return the left value.

name: max_respects_gte_right
description: If the right value is greater-or-equal, max must return the right value.

name: max_with_upper_operand_after_offset
description: If b is above a, adding the same offset must make max choose the offset b side.

name: min_absorbs_max_right
description: Min of a value and the max of that value with another must recover the value.

name: min_associative
description: The typed min helper must be associative.

name: min_bounded_by_left_and_right
description: The min helper result must be below both operands.

name: min_lte_max
description: The minimum of two generated values must be less than or equal to their maximum.

name: min_matches_if_definition
description: The typed min helper must match its direct conditional definition.

name: min_max_middle_right_absorption
description: Max of min(a,b) and b must recover b.

name: min_max_sum_decomposition
description: The sum of min and max must equal the sum of the original operands.

name: min_monotone_left_lte
description: Min must be monotone in its left operand under less-or-equal.

name: min_monotone_right_lte
description: Min must be monotone in its right operand under less-or-equal.

name: min_not_strictly_below_self
description: The min of an Int with itself must not be strictly below that Int.

name: min_of_successor_is_original
description: The min of an Int and its successor must be the original Int.

name: min_respects_lte_left
description: If the left value is less-or-equal, min must return the left value.

name: min_respects_lte_right
description: If the right value is less-or-equal, min must return the right value.

name: min_with_lower_operand_after_offset
description: If a is below b, adding the same offset must make min choose the offset a side.

name: with_binding_in_comparison
description: With-bound Int values must be usable in comparison helpers.

name: with_binding_in_conditional
description: With-bound values must preserve conditional behavior in a body.

name: with_binding_matches_max_definition
description: A with body using an if-based maximum must match the typed max helper.

name: with_binding_matches_min_definition
description: A with body using an if-based minimum must match the typed min helper.

name: with_binding_used_twice
description: A with-bound Int used twice must behave like using the original expression twice.

name: with_do_inner_shadowing_result
description: A do body inside with must return the inner shadowed binding when that is its final expression.

name: with_do_returns_outer_binding
description: A with-bound value must survive sequencing in a do body.

name: with_identity_binding_returns_value
description: A simple with binding must expose its bound Int value in the body.

name: with_if_branch_shadowing
description: A branch-local with binding must shadow only inside the selected branch.

name: with_nested_outer_visible_after_inner
description: After an inner shadowing binding ends, the outer binding must remain visible in the surrounding body.

name: with_shadowing_bool_condition
description: A with-bound Bool condition must choose the same branch as the original Bool expression.

name: with_two_bindings_multiplication
description: Two with-bound Int values must preserve multiplication semantics.

name: with_two_bindings_subtraction
description: Two with-bound Int values must preserve subtraction semantics.
